title: AI-Powered Recruitment Management Platform (Zoho Recruit Alternative)

requirements.text: Build a Motoko backend actor that stores and manages job requisitions including fields: title, department, location, job type (full-time/part-time/contract), description, required skills, experience level, status (draft/open/closed/on-hold), and creation timestamp. Expose CRUD operations for job requisitions.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit with AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Can create, read, update, and delete job requisitions
Job requisition includes all required fields
Status transitions are tracked and persisted

requirements.text: Build a candidate data model in the backend storing: name, email, phone, resume text, skills array, experience years, current status in pipeline (new/screening/shortlisted/interview/offer/hired/rejected), applied job IDs, AI match score per job, and timestamps. Expose CRUD and query-by-job-ID operations.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit with AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Candidates can be created and retrieved by ID or by job application
Pipeline status can be updated per candidate
AI match score field is persisted and retrievable

requirements.text: Implement AI-powered resume parsing in the backend: accept raw resume text input, extract structured data (skills, experience years, education, previous roles) using keyword and pattern matching in Motoko, and return a parsed candidate profile object.

quotes: AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting raw resume text returns a structured candidate profile
Extracted fields include skills, years of experience, and education
Parsing handles common resume formats

requirements.text: Implement AI candidate-to-job match scoring in the backend: compare a candidate's extracted skills and experience against a job's required skills and experience level, compute a percentage match score (0–100), and store the score against the candidate's application record.

quotes: AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Each candidate-job pair has a computed match score between 0 and 100
Score reflects overlap between candidate skills and job requirements
Scores are persisted and can be queried to rank candidates for a job

requirements.text: Implement an applicant tracking system (ATS) pipeline in the backend: support moving a candidate through stages (New → Screening → Shortlisted → Interview Scheduled → Offer Extended → Hired / Rejected), log each stage transition with a timestamp and optional recruiter note, and expose query functions to fetch candidates by pipeline stage for a given job.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Candidates can be moved between defined pipeline stages
Each transition records timestamp and optional note
Candidates can be listed by stage and by job

requirements.text: Implement interview scheduling in the backend: create interview records linked to a candidate and job with fields for date/time, interviewer name, interview type (phone/video/on-site), status (scheduled/completed/cancelled), and notes. Expose CRUD operations for interviews.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Interviews can be scheduled and linked to candidate and job
Interview status can be updated
Interviews are retrievable by candidate or by job

requirements.text: Implement recruiter analytics in the backend: expose query functions that return aggregate metrics including total open jobs, total candidates per job, candidates per pipeline stage, average time-to-hire (days from application to hired), and top-scoring candidates by match score.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Analytics endpoint returns total open jobs count
Per-stage candidate counts are available for each job
Average time-to-hire is computed from timestamps
Top N candidates ranked by AI score are retrievable

requirements.text: Implement email/communication templates in the backend: store reusable message templates with fields for name, subject, body (with placeholders like {{candidateName}}, {{jobTitle}}), and category (application acknowledgement, interview invite, rejection, offer). Expose CRUD operations.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Templates can be created, read, updated, and deleted
Templates support placeholder tokens
Templates are categorized and retrievable by category

requirements.text: Implement role-based access control in the backend: define roles (Admin, Recruiter, Hiring Manager) with associated permissions. Store user-role assignments, and expose functions to check if a caller has a required permission before sensitive operations (e.g., only Admin can delete jobs, only Recruiter/Admin can move candidates).

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Three roles are defined with distinct permission sets
User-role assignments are stored and queryable
Unauthorized callers receive an error on restricted operations

requirements.text: Implement offer letter generation in the backend: accept candidate ID, job ID, salary, start date, and custom clauses, generate a structured offer letter text with all details populated, store the offer record with status (pending/accepted/declined), and expose status update operations.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Offer letters are generated with all provided fields
Offer records are stored with pending/accepted/declined status
Status can be updated and persisted

requirements.text: Build a React frontend with a sidebar navigation layout featuring sections: Dashboard, Jobs, Candidates, Pipeline, Interviews, Analytics, Templates, Offers, and Settings. Include a top header with app logo, logged-in user role indicator, and notification bell icon.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit with AI implenataion

acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar navigation renders all listed sections
Active section is visually highlighted
Header shows app logo, user role, and notification icon
Layout is responsive and collapses sidebar on smaller screens

requirements.text: Build a Dashboard page displaying live recruiter analytics: cards for total open jobs, total active candidates, total interviews this week, and average time-to-hire; a bar chart of candidates per pipeline stage; and a ranked list of top 5 AI-matched candidates across all open jobs.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Metric cards display real data fetched from backend
Bar chart renders candidate counts per pipeline stage
Top 5 AI-matched candidates are listed with scores and job names

requirements.text: Build a Jobs management page: display a searchable, filterable table of all job requisitions with status badges; provide a slide-over form to create or edit a job with all required fields; allow status changes inline; and include a 'View Candidates' action per job that navigates to the filtered candidate pipeline.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Jobs table displays all requisitions with search and filter by status/department
Create/edit form covers all job fields and submits successfully
Status badge reflects current job status
View Candidates navigates to the pipeline filtered by that job

requirements.text: Build a Candidates management page: display a searchable table of candidates with AI match score, pipeline stage badge, and applied job; include a candidate detail panel showing parsed profile, skill tags, match score breakdown, timeline of stage transitions, and linked interviews; provide a resume text upload/paste area that triggers AI parsing and auto-fills the candidate form.

quotes: AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Candidate table is searchable and shows AI score and stage
Detail panel shows all profile fields, skill tags, and stage history
Resume paste area triggers backend parsing and populates the form
AI match score is visually displayed with a progress bar or gauge

requirements.text: Build a Kanban-style Pipeline board page: display columns for each ATS stage (New, Screening, Shortlisted, Interview Scheduled, Offer Extended, Hired, Rejected); show candidate cards with name, job, and AI score; allow drag-and-drop between columns to move candidates through stages with an optional note dialog; filter board by job.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Kanban columns render for all pipeline stages
Candidate cards show name, job title, and AI match score
Dragging a card to a new column updates stage via backend call
Board can be filtered to show only candidates for a selected job

requirements.text: Build an Interviews page: display a list/calendar toggle of scheduled interviews showing candidate name, job, interview type, date/time, interviewer, and status; provide a form to schedule a new interview or edit existing ones; allow marking interviews as completed or cancelled.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Interviews are displayed in both list and simple calendar view
Schedule interview form links to candidate and job
Status can be updated to completed or cancelled
Upcoming interviews are highlighted

requirements.text: Build an AI Chatbot widget visible site-wide as a floating button: the chatbot answers candidate FAQs about job openings, application status, and the hiring process using pre-defined intents and job data fetched from the backend; it includes a suggested-questions quick-reply panel.

quotes: AI implenataion but in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Floating chat button is accessible on all pages
Chatbot responds to at least 10 common recruitment FAQs
Quick-reply suggestions are shown for common intents
Chatbot can list open job titles fetched from the backend

requirements.text: Build an Analytics page with visual charts: line chart for applications over time (last 30 days), donut chart for pipeline stage distribution, bar chart for top jobs by application volume, and a table of average time-to-hire per job. Use React Query to fetch data from backend analytics endpoints.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: All four charts render with real backend data
Charts are labelled and include legends
Data auto-refreshes on page visit via React Query

requirements.text: Build a Templates management page: list all email/communication templates with category filter; provide a rich text editor form to create or edit templates with placeholder token insertion buttons; show a live preview panel rendering the template with sample data.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Templates are listed and filterable by category
Create/edit form supports placeholder token insertion
Live preview renders template with sample candidate and job data

requirements.text: Build an Offers page: list all generated offer letters with candidate name, job, salary, start date, and status badge; provide a form to generate a new offer letter with custom clauses; display a formatted offer letter preview; allow updating offer status to accepted or declined.

quotes: Develop a app like Zoho Recruit

acceptanceCriteria: Offers list shows all fields and status badges
Offer generation form populates all required fields
Formatted offer letter preview renders before saving
Status update (accept/decline) persists via backend call

requirements.text: Apply a bold, modern dark-mode-first design theme across the entire frontend: use a deep charcoal/slate background with vibrant teal and amber accent colors, sharp card borders, clean sans-serif typography, subtle gradient highlights on AI-scored elements, and consistent icon usage throughout all pages.

quotes: in a better way

acceptanceCriteria: Dark background is applied globally
Teal and amber accents are used consistently for CTAs and highlights
AI score elements use gradient treatment to differentiate them visually
Typography and spacing are consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Use the generated hero logo asset (hireiq-logo.dim_200x60.png) in the sidebar header and browser tab favicon. Use the generated dashboard banner (dashboard-banner.dim_1200x300.png) as a decorative header on the Dashboard page.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo appears in the sidebar at correct dimensions
Dashboard banner is rendered at the top of the Dashboard page
Assets are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated

constraints: All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Do not integrate external AI services (OpenAI, etc.); all AI features must use in-canister logic such as keyword matching and scoring algorithms
Do not use external databases; use Motoko stable variables for all persistence
Do not edit files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Frontend must use React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query only
nonGoals: Email sending via SMTP or third-party email services
OAuth or social login (only Internet Identity if authentication is added later)
Multi-tenant SaaS billing or subscription management

required: HireIQ wordmark logo with a minimalist abstract neural-network node icon in teal on a dark background (hireiq-logo.dim_200x60.png)
Wide decorative dashboard banner with abstract flowing data visualization lines in teal and amber on a deep charcoal background (dashboard-banner.dim_1200x300.png)
Small square app icon with the HireIQ initials stylized in teal on dark slate (hireiq-icon.dim_64x64.png)
